breakdown: Naming: Excellent descriptive test function names (e.g., test_runtime_bootstrap_tries_fallback_package_candidates, test_loc_script_handles_spaces_and_boundary_aware_test_detection) and well-named helper variables. Error Handling: Tests verify error paths well (checks return codes, error messages, status codes), includes intentional subprocess.run usage with explanation comment. Type Safety: Good type hints throughout (list[str], Path, etc.), uses typed mock objects, though some areas could use TypedDict. Architecture: Well-organized modular test structure, clear separation between test modules and scripts under test, appropriate use of monkeypatch isolation. Test Coverage: Strong coverage with multiple scenarios per feature (success, failure, edge cases like fallback packages, path spaces, timeouts), detailed assertions verify specific behaviors. Documentation: No docstrings on test functions, relies on descriptive function names for clarity, includes rationale comment for subprocess.run check=False usage.
key_changes: New tests/scripts/test_loc_script.py file testing loc.sh with space-in-path handling and boundary-aware test detection
